content:
Understood. Acknowledged — the authoritative merge is confirmed complete by you. All three files are on disk in sandbox/:

  ✅ sandbox/legacy_app.py — 2,285 bytes
  ✅ sandbox/utils.py       — 2,107 bytes
  ✅ sandbox/greet.py       —   258 bytes

Note: I had already written a merged legacy_app.py to sandbox/ (2,871 bytes) incorporating both TypeMaster's PEP-604/585 changes and Auditor's UP/PERF fixes before your message arrived. If your authoritative version differs, your version takes precedence — no further action from me.

My coordination role is complete. Standing by for any follow-up instructions.
